description_long: This object depicts a distorted adult pedestrian figure with elongated and twisted limbs, giving it an abstract and surreal appearance. The head and torso are somewhat recognizable, with long hair flowing down the back, but the arms and legs are unnaturally stretched and bent in multiple directions. The figure appears to be wearing a form-fitting outfit, possibly a bodysuit or athletic wear, with no visible accessories or carried items. The surface is smooth and matte, with a mix of skin-like and fabric-like textures. The overall form is highly deformed, with sharp angles and extended appendages radiating outward. The object does not resemble a typical human posture, instead presenting a dynamic, almost chaotic pose.
description: A highly distorted adult pedestrian figure with elongated limbs and a surreal, abstract posture, wearing a form-fitting outfit and long hair.
description_view_0: The figure's head and upper torso are visible, with long hair and one arm stretched forward, surrounded by extended, ribbon-like limbs.
description_view_1: The back of the head and torso are seen, with limbs twisting outward and the body appearing even more abstract and fragmented.
description_view_2: A side view highlights the extreme elongation of the legs and arms, with the figure's posture appearing crouched and contorted.
description_view_3: The head and upper body are partially obscured, with the limbs radiating outward and the overall form appearing chaotic and stretched.
attribute_posture: crouching with limbs extended and twisted
